entries.title: US government orders Anthropic to cut off Fable 5 / Mythos 5 access for foreign nationals
entries.summary: Washington directed Anthropic to disable its most capable models for non-US users after the company's own cyber-capability safety warnings, a striking case of safety disclosures triggering a national-security access restriction on a frontier developer.

links.title: Anthropic statement on the US directive to suspend Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access
US orders Anthropic to disable AI models for all foreign nationals (Al Jazeera)
Anthropic's safety warnings may have just backfired (TechCrunch)
Anthropic's Fable and the State of AI (Schneier on Security)

entries.title: G7 leaders and frontier labs agree voluntary AI safety commitments at Évian
entries.summary: At the June Évian summit, G7 heads of state and roughly a dozen lab chiefs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Mistral, Cohere and others) endorsed non-binding pledges on child safety and frontier cyber/bio risk, likely to become a de facto global baseline despite lacking the force of law.

links.title: G7 AI Safety Commitments digest, June 21 2026 (Asanify)
What the 2026 G7 Évian meeting really delivered (AI Governance Lead)

entries.title: OpenAI hit with more ChatGPT wrongful-death suits
entries.summary: Additional parents have filed wrongful-death and product-liability suits alleging ChatGPT contributed to users' suicides, expanding a wave of AI-chatbot tort litigation that now also includes a state attorney-general action against OpenAI and Sam Altman.

links.title: Mother sues OpenAI after daughter's death linked to ChatGPT (Al Jazeera)
Another parent files wrongful-death suit against OpenAI (Engadget)

entries.title: xAI sued by engineer who says he was fired for Grok safety warnings
entries.summary: A former xAI engineer's wrongful-termination/whistleblower complaint alleges he was dismissed after flagging safety problems with Grok, raising fresh questions about internal safety governance at Musk's lab.

links.title: xAI fired an engineer who raised Grok safety alarms, lawsuit claims (TechCrunch)
Former xAI engineer says he was fired over safety warnings (Law360)

entries.title: Anthropic faces class action over Claude Max usage limits
entries.summary: A proposed class action accuses Anthropic of misleading paying subscribers by quietly tightening Claude Max usage caps amid rising compute costs, a consumer-protection angle on how labs manage capacity and disclosures.

links.title: Anthropic hit with lawsuit over Claude Max usage limits (Engadget)
Anthropic accused of misleading users amid soaring AI costs (Gizmodo)

entries.title: KPMG withdraws agentic-AI report after hallucinated case studies
entries.summary: KPMG pulled a flagship report on agentic AI after it was found to contain fabricated statistics and false claims about named organizations, an ironic real-world incident underscoring the reliability risks of AI-assisted professional work.

links.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations (TechCrunch)
KPMG's AI report becomes an accidental demo of AI hallucinations (The Register)

entries.title: CAISI told to halt public frontier-model evaluations
entries.summary: Reports say the US Center for AI Standards and Innovation was directed to stop publishing model evaluations, with testing folded into a more security- and classification-oriented framework under the administration's new AI executive order.

links.title: CAISI ordered to stop public model evaluations amid new AI executive order (Crypto Briefing)

entries.title: New paper: defending agentic AI against model-guided automated attacks
entries.summary: A new arXiv preprint studies 'defensive misdirection' as a mitigation against automated, model-guided attacks on tool-using agentic systems, adding to the adversarial-robustness toolkit for agent security.

links.title: Analyzing Defensive Misdirection Against Model-Guided Automated Attacks on Agentic AI Systems (arXiv 2606.20470)

entries.title: New paper: multi-turn red-teaming and jailbreak benchmarks for LLM agents
entries.summary: A recent arXiv submission proposes benchmarks for multi-turn red-teaming, jailbreaks, and adversarial robustness of LLM agents in safety-critical settings, relevant to evaluation and stress-testing practice.

links.title: LLM agent safety, multi-turn red-teaming, jailbreak benchmarks, adversarial robustness (arXiv 2606.20408)

entries.title: New York passes kids' chatbot-safety bill and AI transparency acts
entries.summary: The New York legislature wrapped its session by passing a children's AI-chatbot safety bill plus AI transparency measures, including a requirement to label AI-generated news content, adding to the patchwork of state AI rules.

links.title: New York lawmakers pass kids' AI chatbot safety bill and two transparency acts (Transparency Coalition)
NY Legislature passes landmark bill to disclose AI-generated news (NY Senate)

entries.title: Coverage: International AI Safety Report flags rising real-world AI incidents
entries.summary: Fresh commentary on the 2026 International AI Safety Report highlights that capability gains keep widening harm pathways while visibility into misuse lags, citing climbing content-generation incidents and persistent prompt-injection success rates.

links.title: AI incidents on the rise: insights from 2026 safety report (The Hill)
It may already be too late to control AI (Washington Post)
